Terrible service and zero logic. After ordering, I got an email saying my main item was out of stock. Rather than reaching out to offer a replacement, they just sent the rest of the order without the main course. It is common sense to call the customer in this situation. Instead, I’m left with half an order and a hungry family. Will not be ordering again.

very disappointed with the their help centre ordered and payed online and the main item was missing for which i payed 1050 rs i received only the side dish and they charged me fully didn't refund me despite complaining multiple times. no option to call and if u go through the online form they have chat box and it takes so unnecessarily long to reach them and if your screen times out during waiting the chat automatically closes and you're left to do the process all over again.

A rider accepted the order but did not reply to my messages and stayed at the same location without picking up the food. When I tried to cancel, Foodpanda warned me about blocking cash on delivery in the future. Very disappointing experience.

Item got cancelled because it is unavailable (they did not inform about it before payment). But I still need the item, so I had to buy from another shop. Paid twice for expensive delivery because they can't be bothered to inform that an item is unavailable beforehand. Why does a customer need to pay extra for your incompetence?

in the past I really liked FoodPanda but now I think I prefer other platforms. why ? because of the lack of live agents. I had no help, couldn't reach an agent and at the end I had to pay the delivery guy for just one bread...
Foodpanda makes ordering food super easy! Great variety of restaurants, fast delivery, and good discounts. Perfect for satisfying cravings anytime.
Fast and convenient food delivery service. Many restaurant choices and the app interface is smooth. Great discounts and promotions too!
We are disappointed with the delivery quality. The cake arrived in a damaged condition, with messy finishing and compromised presentation. This does not meet expected standards.

The reason why I rate this 2 star is because of the map they're using.. Once riders were not allowed to pass through by the villager's guard (if the map provided is a shortcut, most of the guards doesn't allow the riders to pass through), the app is providing longer route to riders and it's taking too long for the food to be delivered.. Next thing we know the ETA that app is providing to us customers are way tooo long..

a lot of glitches is this app or should I say bad policies in this app. I placed an order with a total of P380 when I checked out it changes to P489 I tried to cancel but it says that I can no longer refund. making my gcash debited without receiving my order. i chat with help centre and i got the same resolution. no refund at cancellation at the start of an order which was not even past 1 minute. tsk tsk tsk. you will lose a lot of good customer with this service.

Nothing came back. They can't even escalate and won't give compensation for the inconvenience it caused. Now the rep I'm talking to says they can't find the order ID. I have the screenshot of it and provided it to the first two people I spoke with now they can't locate it?

Just to let you guys know, if any case something in your order is missing this app will rip you off instead of redelivering your order. What happened is I bought meal with medium fries that adds over 90 pesos and I didn't get any fries and yet they only refunded me 39 pesos, RIP OFF basically.
Absolute Rubbish showing time of 5-25 minutes and Didn't received after 1.5 hour and at last cancelled it by doing messages to the team worst experience.

The app itself is infuriating, only give a few minutes to choose items replacement and no notification for it at all. That does not include the fact there will be at least one or two discount/promotion popup everytime you open the app.

Foodpanda is a convenient and reliable food delivery app with a good variety of restaurants to choose from. The app is easy to use, ordering is smooth, and delivery is usually on time. Food quality has been consistently good, and the packaging is neat and hygienic. Their offers and discounts make ordering affordable, especially for regular users. Customer support is responsive and helpful whenever there is an issue. Overall, Foodpanda is a great option for quick and hassle-free food delivery.

well i have a Foodpanda pro and I order from it around 8.30 p.m. the order was ready by 8.50 p.m. and rider picked it instead of coming to me who's on 10 min way he goes to sham Nagar who's 40 min away and my order delivered me after 1 and half hour, this is what Foodpanda is. I am truly ashamed to trust this app it's my fault.
Waited more than 2hrs to receive my food. There's no customer service contact option for help.
absolutely pathetic!!. I'm a panda pro subscriber and on top of that I paid extra for express delivery still my was delayed for than an hour, had to wait about 2 hours in total.

awful experience, i am their almost 3 year old customer, today i ordered one biryani from a restaurent that took only 2 min to deliver order directly their riders took almost 2+ hours to deliver, their is no proper option to contact their support or ask for refunds. going to uninstall right now.
Unfortunately the app doesn't allow order cancellation despite in the prepping stage and I'm very disappointed to have this experience
orders are always delayed and its very hard to cancel the order, they give you no choice but to wait

I’ve been using Foodpanda for more than 5 years, and unfortunately the experience has been consistently frustrating. Customer support is very slow and often unhelpful when issues come up. The help page inside the app is poorly organized and makes it hard to find clear answers. The information shown during ordering is also unclear—I once misordered and canceled without knowing the order was non-refundable, which resulted in losing my money. For an app this established, this is very disappointing.

Foodpanda is a lifesaver and absolutely deserves 5 stars! It's incredibly convenient to browse so many restaurant options right from my phone and get delicious food delivered straight to my door. The variety of cuisines is fantastic, catering to every craving, and the ordering process is always smooth and easy. Highly recommend for anyone looking for hassle-free food delivery!

Worst ever experience. Ordered through Foodpanda and after one and half hour 2 riders passed on my order because it was too far from them and next one asked me to cancel and when I cancelled the order I neither got refund nor my order of which I have paid money online. Don't ever order through Foodpanda. If it was possible I would give them rating in negative

They deducted my Gcash without ordering or subscribing anything. The customer service also cut me off they end the chat without even finishing my message. All I want is a refund.
nice foodpanda wait about 2hours then cancel my order. what can I order at 10pm ???? Not even provide a complaint option to feedback the issue :)

Very disappointed with the overall experience. Have been a long time subscriber but it's perks and promotions have deteriorated. Facing an issue with changing my payment mode and seek help from them but didn't solve!
This app give you options and delivery from your favorite restaurants. Food panda makes order something to eat quick and fast. Very user-friendly.

Forced me to download this app when I tried to order via browser. Then nothing happens when I clicked on "place order". Tried with other eateries and still the same. Basically the "place order" button is broken so cannot order anything!! Can't even reach out to any agents! wth is this?! Now I got nothing to eat 😡 I will be cancelling my subscription if this persists since I can't even use it!!

Has only 1 cancelation button. If you ever made even a silly mistake, pls dont use that cancelation button, it comes with only one option, cancel and no refund. Wasted money canceling an order, it will be charge on you anyway. Should have at least put penalties for mistake, but they probably are getting richer with that option. Imagine being charge for nothing. FoodPanda's scam type business. Dont ever subscribe. Look for a different app or better yet, just Use COD. App cant be trusted anymore.
just that...its getting longer and longer waiting time. when i first used it, the waitin time was like, 15-20mins. now 50-70. need to purchase priority delivery...hmmm

Worst app honestly. I subscribed to Foodpanda last month using a Rox app voucher. This month I don’t even need the subscription because Foodpanda hardly works in my area. Every time I click unsubscribe, it shows I’m unsubscribed, but the app still keeps attempting to deduct money. I contacted customer support but got no help

Only using this app because I cannot find the restaurant I want to order from on the other app. One order later and I am already reminded of why I do not favor this app. There is no guarantee on your food being delivered on time because of the mixed quality of delivery personnel on top of the fact that they do not even dare to set a time-garuntee or money back. Would not recommend.
Rubbish company. Many years ago they could not deliver. Til today still no improvements. Riders just deliver to wrong locations all the time. No food arrived.
Ordering food is also very easy and fast, delivery is also fast, I really like the foodpanda application because it makes my daily life easier

The worst food delivery experience. The worst app. I placed order for fries from potato corner, initially the time was 25-30 minutes then an hour later the time is 45 minutes. I kept clicking on the help button but the app just give automated message and doesn't let you contact support

Very bad experience with the Foodpanda application. They are scammers. I ordered food and the app showed a delivery time of 50 minutes, but it took 1 hour and 30 minutes to arrive. Horrible experience, specially to Zark Megamall and FoodPanda, we placed the order 12noon, we waited for 3 hours. The worst part, they took your money and you don't have a way to cancel your order. You left with no choice but to wait for your order. What an experience.
literqlly the worst app omg it dosent let me input card details even after installing and uninstalling the app million times so there isnt any way i can use my card
Foodpanda is very convenient for ordering food. Wide restaurant options, quick delivery, and an easy ordering process.
horrible. I tried ordering but it shows that it has no service in my location. why you even opened an app where u can't provide widely?

Foodpanda is an excellent app for ordering food quickly and conveniently. The app is easy to use, offers a wide variety of restaurants, and delivery is usually fast and reliable. I love real-time tracking, great deals, and smooth checkout experience. Highly recommended for anyone who enjoys hassle-free food delivery!

Refunds are never paid. False advertising of food. You can order and the restaurant will call saying they don't have food. I've waited almost 2 months now for a refund and still haven't received it. you're better off using any other food delivery service in the country. Foodpanda is by far the worst.

its make ordering food quick and simple. There are many restaurants options and delivery is usually fast

Their customer service is totally worst than other food app also their food rate there is different from the other app its more expensive than other app.

No option to contact the rider while the order is active, and rider marked the order as delivered when I didnt get my order. Chris from customer support kept repeating there is no option to contact the driver after delivery but there was no option to begin with even during the order.

this is an amazing application always gets good and fresh food on time even I had a problem with my phone number they solve it in a minute loveeee itt highly recommend

The worse app ever! took hours to deliver when given estimated time is only 15-10 minutes...THE WORSEE APP IF YOU ARE HUNGRY.

when you are top tired to go shopping, food panda provides you with the groceries at your doorstep. Excellent pace and timing.

awfull service in Pakistan mostly u receive wrong Orders and when u do receive the right one it's always soggy and awfull taste and missing ingredients.

Vouchers dont work anymore, customer service sucks, once a service which used to be the best in town is slowly dying.
very slow service placed order at 21:37 at that total time required time was 35-50 min(MAX) NOW ITS 22:36 still showing 30 min more too much frustrating 😤

Wasting time very well Order submitted then waiting so long & Wasting 1.30 hours Then cancle order Great job ! Order successfully cancelled

Hey Bilal, 

Thanks for reaching out. 

We aim to provide all our customers with the best service possible. Our team is working hard to address this issue and we want to assure you that we truly appreciate your support.

If you would like to get in touch with us directly, please contact us via our live chat support for an immediate response.

content: customer service is one of the worst in the industry. no way to contact them other than using an AI chat and even the humans who interact with you only speak using pre-made sentences and act like robots. Horrendous, absolutely horrendous.
It's so convenient! i can even order food for my loved ones while far away!
the delivery charges and delivery time is getting outrageous. I have been using this app for quite a long years but now I'm considering deleting it

bad not very good...cut much of money order little but platform charge & other then bill very much.

worst delivery app. can't talk to real customer service rep, no actual resolution for delivery hiccups, etc.

very responsive and easy to use! I like it! Hope it is always as it is if not better than the first time experience!
this app is not good because voucher not apply and not support foodpanad team for help other app is so good for helping, food and voucher complains

what kind of app does provide a cancel option and not do a refund? i ordered just minutes ago and tried to cancel my order because i want to modify something and then when i click cancel i didn't receive any refund. customer service just says its their policy and they do not issue refunds. what kind of policy is that? they should really just cancel this app so useless and unprofessional

I have been living in Mayakanon, Basabo for the last 10 months. There are many restaurants nearby in Basabo and Khilgaon, but the app shows very limited options and mostly restaurants from far areas like Wari and Paltan. overcharged me alot of times. Prices mentioned in the menu of restaurant are cheaper than the ones mentioned in this app. the discounts and vouchers provided by the app are worthless, would cost the same even without the vouchers through direct restaurant purchase.
Foodpanda provides an amazing user experience It has made life easier for so many people. They have solved problems which we did not even know existed

been using the app for years. i hate the recent update where the order pushes through even when incomplete. i recently ordered 2 meals (1 for me, 1 for my gf) and only 1 meal arrived and saw that the other was cancelled in the app due to unavailability. i mean this is fine but the vendor should have called first if they cant fulfill parts of the order for us to cancel or amend the order. very frustrating & disappointing. (btw this happened twice in a week)

Very unresponsive drivers. Been waiting for an hour for the order but no response has been given or even updated. Was informing us that there's a 'Heavy Traffic', where we have confirmed there is no traffic in the area.

This app is probably very scammy as it took my order then after order placement unplaced the order and showed me my cart with an extra level price. It didn't even send me any notification. shame on such people.

WORST APP! EVER I ordered Jollibee last Feb 14, and the order didn't arrive! but it was paid through online payment! and I reached out for the help center and they told me to wait for 3DAYS!!, after waiting for 3 days!! they SAID they COULDN'T refund my money!! DON'T EVER DOWNLOAD THIS APP. IF YOU DO MAKE SURE YOU DON'T PAY ONLINE CAUSE THEY WON'T REFUND YOUR MONEY. They will only make you wait for NOTHING.
Terrible experience, Already 3 hours passed still food is not delivered. Can't complain anywhere. Their service is too poor

I’m extremely disappointed with my experience tonight. Your app clearly stated that the 10PM late-night voucher could only be used after 10PM. I waited specifically until 10PM to place my order, only for the app to suddenly say that I can’t use the voucher. This is frustrating and unacceptable. I planned my order around this voucher, wasted my time waiting, and now I’m left hungry with no explanation as to why the voucher doesn’t work as advertised.

the current updated version isn't good because the pin location can't be automatically changed like the previous one before the application was updated, that's why i didn't bother checking out the pin location when i ordered, that's became my fault. i like the previous version more.

Poor service. The order gets ready, but the rider goes to collect it at his own convenience, and then takes more time during delivery as well. Foodpanda said the delivery would take 1 hour, but the rider collected the order after 2 hours, and then delivered it another 30 minutes later. You order just one item and end up waiting 2.5 hours—by then, a person’s hunger is gone.

Would've been a 5 star if werent for the horrible customer support! Everything in the help center are just preset answers, 0 customer service. If you encounter a real issue with your order, all you get are useless pieces of information rather than actual support!

from bad to worse. customer support is non existent. so many steps to get to live chat and once you are in, you cannot leave or minimise chat. if you do, there is no way to return to chat anymore. app navigation is very confusing and not user friendly.

What's wrong with foodpanda in Pakistan? I placed an order and 2 orders were placed from the same place I ordered from. They told me it was a glitch but didn't refund me for the 2nd order even though I got a call from the restaurant that I ordered from that they can cancel it for me and just send the 1 order. A new scam foodpanda Pakistan has started it seems. Now it's just better to order directly from the restaurant instead of foodpanda.

Pandamart delivered rotten eggs, and now they’re refusing a refund because of their 48-hour policy. Who even finishes 12 eggs in two days? They looked completely fine from the outside, but I only realized they were spoiled on the third day. Really disappointing experience.
the 50% off for new user is not true. it's showing but cannot be applied. i think foodpanda forgot to turn it on

Worst app ever. I placed an order with advance payment, but the order was never delivered. There was no proper customer support, no contact point, and no response to my complaint. This feels like fraud. I strongly recommend never using this app. Very disappointing experience.

Really disappointed with choosing this app for food delivery. Ordered and waited 3 hours for food, contacted the restaurant and they told your order is ready but there's no rider of foodpanda and we also can't deliver it by our own. After 3 hours wait they cancelled the order.

If i could rate 0 i would, if the order takes too long to be even accepted there should be a cancel button this is such a hassle and waste of time, we order because we are hungry if the delay is so long it's UNEXCEPTABLE THIS CANNOT BE REDEEMABLE BY VOUCHER, WE CAN'T EVEN HAVE LIVE CHAT SUPPORT, THIS IS SUCH A HORRIBLE AND TRASH EXPERIENCE. GRAB IS SERIOUSLY BETTER THAN THIS APP

Multiple times in a row of bad experiences, ranging from late deliveries to missing food items (was told it will take around 45 minutes for replacement even though the place is 15 minutes away) to cancellation after more than 30 minutes because the restaurant was closed. Why accept my order in the first place then? By that time it was too late for me to order anything except MacDonalds. I rarely complain but when it comes to food, don't test me. I got so sick of giving feedback that I just gave up because those people at the backend will just say sorry to me but nothing more and not try to find a proper solution.

Worst app ever. This app is very unprofessional and misleading. It embarrassed me in front of my guests. The order was delivered after 2 hours, and even then the order kept getting assigned to different riders again and again. Worst experience using this app

Worst Delivery Platform. I ordered once, I am very certain. The app does the tracking of the status of the order. I got my order and was surprised to receive another after 20 minutes. I escalated it to customer service and I quote, "If you place the same order within 5 minutes with the same restaurant so it will be detected as duplicate order and will not be pushed through." I checked my email notification and said I ordered in 1 minute interval, how come its not detected as they claimed?

The service has been terrible lately. I have been trying to get assistance about my concerns for days now and all i get is "someone will call you in 30 mins". And here i am waiting for almost 24 hrs for that call back. No one seems to know what the status of your reported issue is. They just right away escalate the call when it's not neccessary. Very quick to auto debit the account but takes days to do refund.

Live chat support sucks. Operator closed the window before even checking that everything is fine and there's no way of finding back the same operator. Ordered food thrice, all stated approximately 30-35 minutes but all times, delivery was late (more than 15 minutes). I got sms notifications but why not just give us a more accurate waiting time for the orders to begin with?? In my opinion, this is a basic app to get food but is seriously lacking in professionalism and efficiency

Absolutely pathetic experience with Foodpanda. I cannot believe I gave them a 5 stars before. For the fifth consecutive time of placing my order, I had to cancel it because my order never came. I waited 3+ hours because they said "just 10-15 mins more" or "the rider is on his way". I am done with using this horrendous application, going to use something better like EatOye or I might even learn how to cook so I don't have to order from Foodpanda ever again.

More grief than convenience. More than a few times, the restaurant accepts the orders, (apparently) prepares it, (apparently) picked up by the rider, then seemingly takes forever to arrive. Customer Service would say that the rider is on the way, then the restaurant cancels the order. So, in the entire process, we would have waited for more than an hour and to two in some instances. At that stage, we are completely hungry and angry. This has happened too many times. No more Foodpanda for us.
replyContent:
Hey there,

Thanks for reaching out. 

We aim to provide all our customers with the best service possible. Our team is working hard to address this issue and we want to assure you that we truly appreciate your support.

If you would like to get in touch with us directly, please contact us via our live chat support for an immediate response.

content: The advertisement did not indicate the full details of the meal contents, eg. whether the meal includes or excludes rice, and we are left to assume. At least with picture, it will best display the meal. Food selection and navigation can be improved on. Foodpanda delivery timing is on the spot and they deliver it hot. Payment is easy. Update on location and requested time is also easy.

This was a great service before. I used to order two meals a day from here but now, I can't trust them to deliver the whole order. Sometimes, the items I order are missing and when I complain, all I hear is this excuse "We have reviewed the situation but we can't do a refund." IT'S LIKE OUR HARD EARNED MONEY DOESN'T MATTER! This makes me want to stop using this app for good. We can survive without orders if Foodpanda thinks otherwise.

NEVER order from foodpanda. They will always, ALWAYS be late, so much so that a 45min waiting time can easily become more than double that. And when you inquire from customer service, they'll either say that there're overwhelming orders or there's something wrong with their system. In either case, they continue to accept new orders and just pray that customer don't cancel the orders that they'll never be able to deliver on time, giving their customers false hope. Terrible management, terrible service.

My disappointment adds up everytime I order here. The estimated more-than-an-hour waiting time is not even followed. I know that usual deliver, when you call in fastfood chains, lasts for about 30 mins. But the estimted time for this app is an hour or more and when that time frame is met, you wait for another 30 to less than an hour before you actually get your food. So thats almost 2 hours!! Plus their chat support is not even helpful. This is so annoying especially for people who are really busy and time concious. I'm going to try a different app, something, just anything better than this really.

outstanding platform but they should bring features like to make a call by sharing a contact of the rider and also to cancel at least under 2 minutes after confirmation of order or else to modify or switch but after confirmation this features should be added. Also there is no feature present to order food from two restaurant at same time by same driver I think it should be there as well if the other food chain is within the range of the driver.

I recently ordered food through Foodpanda and unfortunately had a very disappointing experience. I waited over 1.5 hours for my delivery, and at this point, there was still no sign of my order. To make matters worse, I was unable to cancel the order, despite it being significantly delayed, and I had already paid for it.I understand that delays can happen,but the lack of communication regarding my order's status was frustrating. Attempting toreach customer support was not as helpful.

Beware ordering within 90 minutes of a restaurant's closing. Restaurants accept orders, tell you that your order is being "prepared" and then continue to increase the amount of time until delivery. Then they close and your order is cancelled and refunded. Awesome that I got a refund. Not awesome that I waited almost 2 hours for food that did not come and I'm still hungry. Might be a good idea to force restaurants to stop accepting orders 2 hours before closing time.

Very disappointing customer service, honestly. I tried to verify my phone number but I was unable to get the code ro which they told me to "contact through help center". There is literally no option there to contact them and my order is still pending because of that. Just have a phone number at least where people can share their problems.

application error that cause our orders to be canceled after waiting for over an hour!! the contact number of the rider should be displayed so we can call them and check how long it will take for the order rather than wait and starve!! there should be an option to cancel when the order is longer than the estimated delivery time! people who can't go outside to buy food, like myself (pregnant), are relying on food delivery. so please keep your application updated!!

2022: working well but suddenly I can't log in at all. Ohno 2017: It's a bit hard to properly use the app if the retailers themselves do not use it properly. Have had several orders cancelled or just not accepted at all. Maybe if an order is not accepted when the store is known to be open, an automatic cancellation or a simple notification can be made? So we don't have to wait and track but not receive any food. I don't mind not receiving my food if I know 20 minutes in advance at least.

It used to be a good app. But kinda annoyed when they said that the food had picked-up for delivery and will arrived in around 2 mins. Suddenly, they will tell you that they cannot take my order coz they're busier than expected. I dunno but, u shouldn't tell the customers that the food is on the way but the truth is, they can't take our orders.

It was working well for a while and then there were a few incidents that i was just so disappointed. This incident kept repeating w/o improvements or compensation that I stopped using this app. I ordered from a shop and it was stated that it would take half an hour. Then the live updates kept adding more and more minutes until i had to wait for more than an hour - if it had taken that long, i wouldn't even order in the first place! In the end i couldn't even eat as I had to leave for work.

Everything is temporarily closed at 8:50pm on the app. This is really frustrating as If I can find food easily around my area and I have time to do so, I wouldn't have needed to place any orders through an app. Also, it accepts and then cancels my order multiple times. Such a waste of time and unprecedented by any other food delivery apps I have used. Food panda team, Please just scrap this app and all the liveup benefits collaboration if you are unable to deliver.
replyContent: Hey J. S., Thanks for reaching out. We aim to provide all our customers with the best service possible. content: I've had several time when my orders were late or cancelled randomly bit I returned because there aren't a lot of options. Well after waiting an hour (past delivery time) for food and then an hour of tense conversations with customer service to get my refund on a large 300+baht order, I'm done. I'm uninstalling. It's faster to cook the food myself.

Foodpanda is the worst in terms of service, customer service and after sales. Every transaction I made with them came with some sort of problem. Either transaction is cancelled mid-order(after waiting for a considerable time already), food is delivered super late, delivery person is rude and ill trained, or food delivered with missing items. There is also nowhere to complain. No customer hotline and their email address is just a vacuum in cyberspace.

I think foodpanda should start taking actions on "Fake Booking". I've been using your app for quite a while now and it is really convenient however, upon experiencing that someone is using your Info. ( Name , Addres ) just to make a fake order wasn't pleasant at all. My information on your app isn't safe at all, given that some else can use it. Even the introductions I always give whenever I order are being used! I feel bad for the delivery guy. Now I wanted to delete my account...

ordered food at 9.46pm, and checked that the order will be sent in 32 minutes. after checking back the app to track the order at 10.12pm, the payment went through but order could not be traced. contacted the "chat" and was told that food would arrive at 10.40pm, which was almost 30 minutes later than promised. the chat personnel checked again and said due to a technical error, ordered was not taken and restaurant has closed. the most annoying thing is that the app has become an inconvenience! 😡

userName: Hkun Hpung aka Gumring Seng Lahtaw Wala
content: I had a terrible experience. My order was missing an item, and I contacted support immediately, but the item never came. When I later requested a refund, they refused. I lost money equal to 3 days of my salary because of their mistake. Very disappointed with the service — no responsibility, no proper support. I will not trust this app again unless they fix this.

This is a very bad delivery service. You have to wait for more than an hour to receive your order. The service agent could only give an alibi that there are several orders being processed. That is not a good reason, otherwise close your service. Imagine, after waiting for more than an hour, starving at that, the only remedy the service agent could give is whether we would want to cancel our order. REALLY? Don't use this APP, grab food is better.

content: About 25% of my orders are cancelled more than 1 hour after my order. This happens very often with this app and only today I realise that for cancelled orders (not by me), I have to request for a refund which will only come in 5-7 days later? So all along, not only have you caused us to starve, but you also charged for all my past cancelled orders?! When I looked into my history, only orders within the same month show up so its too late to request for a refund for all the prev months??!? Scam?!

After 2 hour of waiting the food I called the restaurant (because food panda doesn't have a contact) and they said that they didn.t even received the order. I ordered directly and the food arrived in 30 min. The guy from the restaurant said that he hates the app too and they also have many problems with it. It was not the first bad experience with them. Moreorver, there is no group order option. Awful. Hip menu was the best. That was my last order from Food Panda and I deleted the application.

Worst app and service! Do not install! We ordered food from KFC and we're missing some items. The rider confirmed that the items are complete but found out it's missing 1 pc chicken and rice. I reached out to their customer service and was told to wait for 1-3 working days. Seriously? Just for a piece of chicken and rice we have to wait that long? I wasn't even asking for a refund. All I wanted to happen was to ask the rider to go back to the store and pick up the missing item but they can't!

Sometimes your order gets randomly canceled. Sometimes after half an hour of waiting. Sometimes the restaurants you want to order from are randomly closed (but open to different apps). Sometimes it works and does its job. It's really a gamble. Sometimes it cancels your order after waiting an hour for a 20 min order. Are you willing to take the chance? Better use glovo.

I tried to place an order. I said "i tried" because after placing an order at 21.30, i reveiced a message at 22.05, nearly 35 minutes later thst my order has been canceled. A very bad and frustrating experience. You do not have delivery guys in the area? Don't take orders. It's that easy. After talking to the chat support, i received a 15 lei voucher. If you think that i will try to order from you again, you are sadly mistaken. Use other apps to order food, because this one is very low.

content: Promotions with very limited redemption limits, Customer service that only copy-pastes template replies without understanding your issue, Compared to Grab many riders (not all) are unprofessional and rude probably due to the lack of proper training and due to bad compensation from the company. If you think that's all nope, good luck with all the glitches, automatically cancelled orders for no reason, refunds that take over 2 weeks and inflated delivery fees whenever they can.

The app is full of bugs. I can't always find the restaurants I've order from before, sometimes I can't send the order as the app tells me the products are not available (although I can order the same products via other apps), the filtering for restaurants returns incorrect results or just doesn't filter at all. I end up getting angry everytime I order due to the endless and ever present bugs. I don't recommend it, wouldn't even give it a star if I could.

App is fine but priority delivery option turned out to be a scam. Everytime I pay extra for priority, it's never met- there's 'always a slight delay'. Normal delivery is always faster than the priority.

The app sucks so bad. I have food panda pro yet most of the time restaurants dont take orders. Delivery time almost always takes an hour to come and I sometimes get charged with delivery fees even with the panda pro. Customer service also sucks, barely useful.

It's very frustrating to add items to card and then see that all of them are out of stock. If the restaurant is closed at the time it should say so! Also, I would like to know a restaurant is busy and doesn't take orders before it takes my money! I placed an order and after 10 minutes I got a message saying they can't deliver. Location works poorly. I always have to adjust it. I recommend to just place the skin of food panda over the app HipMenu. It was so much better!

I have a food panda costumer fir rhe longest time. But lately, the deliveries are always late and the drivers do not care of the state of food that they deliver. Just now, I've placed my order at 7 pm and it's already 8:18 and they are still preparing the food. Why bother using this app if it's to go there and order by myself. 😤

Theres no option in terms of canceling orders which terrible esp if charged automatically to my visa. The bakery doesn't have all the items I placed, so Me, the driver and bakery trying to cancel.. there should be such option.

Dear Customer Support, I am extremely disappointed with your service regarding my order (Order# ssf2-2608-7gc0). The order was placed at 6:05 PM and delivered at 7:36 PM, which is more than 90 minutes later. Due to this unacceptable delay, the food was completely cold and not fit to eat. As a result, the entire order was wasted. I have already submitted a complaint through the app, but it has now been more than 24 hours and I have not received any response, update, or compensation. This kind of

Tips for people who wants to save money and time in this app: 1. Don't register using someone else's device. You won't be able to use specific vouchers since they'll treat your account as a fake one that aims to utilize the voucher system. Multiple accounts on a device ID is a no-no. 2. Most of the delivery fee is based on the distance so the closer it is, the lower you'll pay for delivery. Choose pick-up and click on restos near me. You'll see the nearest restos. Switch to delivery next.

Foodpanda is a popular food delivery app that's got you covered! 🍔🥤 You can order your favorite food from a wide range of restaurants and have it delivered right to your doorstep. They've got a huge selection of restaurants to choose from, and you can even track your order in real-time ¹. Are you looking for some promo codes or discounts? Or maybe you need help with an issue? Their customer support is pretty responsive .

Not a creadible app. Said %50 for first order. When I downloaded it and attept to order food, ending up seeing the offer is capped at ৳170. I instatnly, deleted the app with 1 star. tip: You had better take the resturent name and order them by call. (No tex, no vat included)

I usually don't write review, I order foodpanda minimum 8 to 12 times a week. The way you guys handled my order on 31st night and how your customercare could not even give a response on what's going on its just pathetic I waited over a hour, I really didn't want a refund I just wanted the food you guys could not even handle that. I have been with foodpanda for years and I order all the time (check my orders) I guess it's time to move on.

Every time there is a situation where there is an item missing and I was charged, order did not arrive but was marked delivered, rider asked for a different amount from what is on total amount, etc. FoodPanda's customer service is trained to give you the runaround and will always try to pass you on to the next agent or disconnect you randomly. This is if you even get the chance to connect to their customer service. Prepare to spend more money than you expect.

content: Not as good as you think. Everything's fine until you encounter errors. The first time i got order wrong, it was settled although not enough. The second time I got a wrong item delivered, I was told they cannot process my request, yet can't provide a clear explanation why. Poor customer service. Plus, prices are way too high than the regular store price. I mean, i get it why, that's how they keep this app from running. But I suggest to use local delivery services in your area instead.

one of the most frustrating apps to work with. constantly asking for verification and when the same code is being sent over and not working over and over again. uninstall reinstall the app. clear cache still not working. restart the app. still not working. restarting the phone and still not working. save yourself from the headache and use some other app

Useless approach to handover multiple orders to a single rider simultaneously and Food Panda representing this as to save fuel and to minimise the delivery fee. not more than a joke that i am waiting for my order for over an 1 hour and the rider is making three deliveries and then he will deliver my order.

Ridiculous. Will be uninstalling this app. I had a missing item and all I was offered was a $8 voucher. Look, it doesn't make sense to re-order, fall short of the minimum order; effectively spending more money for some blunder someone out there made. Don't need your voucher and your business anymore. Guess I'll just stick with Grab and 'roo.

Used to be great. I had been using this app for years.. but recently, the estimated time for arrival is not accurate. I waited for more than 1 hour and the food has not even been picked up. (Fyi the app shows 25 mins est time) Even after 1 hour, it is still showing 13mins. Even worse, the time keep increasing. If there is not enough riders or the restaurant is too overloaded , please show in the app to avoid this inconvenience. Thank you food panda. I am very disappointed.

content: Initially I loved the idea of food panda so I have them 4 stars. However, over the last two years I have been unable to order anything due to Verification where I input the right number, but it never works. That's an app problem, and they have never responded to my inquiries. My wife orders, it takes up to 2 hours to deliver the order. The only reason I even consider using this app now is because there are occasional restaurants that are only available on this app.

1 Star because customer support is almost non existent, and delivery time is extremely unreliable and inaccurate. it's very normal that they promise delivery within 75 minutes, and then you wait +3 hours for the actual delivery, and the funny part is that you can't get any support and can't even cancel the order. Also unsubscribed from Panda Pro, I won't support a business that doesn't respect their customers time.

Gave a suggestion to customer service chat (viki) on putting a field for notes to driver (for amount to expect for change) but she just said there is a place for that in delivery address. This is illogical to change every single order since you cant expect the same amount every time. Can't even acknowledge a suggestion and instead argued. Order got marked delivered even if it wasn't yet. Then when I got the order, it was far from expected as the food item description was misleading.

It seems the profile information can be easily breached by anyone. Someone on facebook just messaged me and asked if I'm the one who ordered a meal in a fastfood restaurant, he/she listed the order correctly in the message, and then messaged me a cursed word. I don't know him/her, it seems the account is private or a dummy, I didn't waste my time to reply so I just blocked the account. The order was canceled by foodpanda due to the main item was out of stock according to the fastfood.

I suggest for a feature where before you press order you can also press a bill expected to be given to the riders. For them to be aware, because even messaging them doesn't help because they always don't have change. Some riders aren't being honest for money change. Most of them saying they don't have a change for a bill even it is small bill and ordering in a afternoon where they already been active delivering. We don’t mind giving tip, just don't hold us up.

Not a good app, 1 star is an overstatement - rating should have been lower. Been waiting for my order, FOR AN HOUR, before I followed up through chat. You told me you'll expedite but then advised that the restaurant I ordered from is already closed. Would still be opened the time I placed my order. Note that they will not place your order if no rider available (understandable) but atleast advise the users every 5 or 10mins if still no rider available for them to have the option to cancel.

worst experience ever。。 this is the 3rd time my order item missing .. service is bad , rider is not professional, when I meet an issue I got no one to complaint. worst service I ever see if compare to grab ! I wonder how this platform can still survive and stay for so long .. it should be closed down.

UI is so buggy, keeps asking me for my location but the tab is stuck at the bottom of the screen. Unable to switch primary payment method as the app keeps saying there's an error, unable to delete primary card to switch as nothing happens when other card is selected.

I order thousands of dollars from food panda monthly if not weekly. I got cold pizza tonight costed $679, which i can't stand and threw away. Customer service offered me $20 coupon. This is the service food panda provides to their customers. Absolutely horrible way to treat their loyal customer. I am thinking of switching over to the other service provider.

Order was cancelled all the sudden by foodpanda. They then blame you for cancelling it. I never even touched my phone after placing the order. Spoke with 2 chat reps and they keep saying its non refundable. Thats 1.2k down the drain. If you need to order online, foodpanda is not the one. Sucks to be a foodpanda pro user but get this service.
Pickup progress indicator is not accurate, i arrive at the right time but the food still not ready

More on fees or charges but less in customer satisfaction. Riders take more than one order, making multiple stops. This action not only delayed the food delivery but also its quality, which would affect the restaurant's image. Overdelivery in promises but underdelivery in service. Not sure if the company itself is doing something about what's lacking or just reading what's happening. It's sad because we will have this term "we don't have a choice" if something will not change

I am changing my review from 5 star to 0. For the past two weeks I had the worst experience with Food Panda. The agents keep you waiting and make wrong commitments when you don't get your food after waiting 3 hours and they keep doing that. One more thing if you ever thought of uninstalling the app, you can't delete your account and all your private information is theirs forever. They don't allow you to delete your account. I find it more easy to order directly from the restaurant.

content: using this app is a whole new experience. Not only you can buy ready to eat foods, but you can buy raw and fresh foods too. Foodpanda really does feel like an online grocery app because of the broad choices of ingredience you can buy on your phone, and if I don't feel like cooking, I can just choose to buy food from a restaurant and sent it to my front door. A recommended app to use after working hard throughout the day.

I wanted to make changes to my order but the system said that the option is not available and suggested to cancel the order and place the order again. Which I did but since they didn't return my money to my card, I placed the order paid cash expecting the money will be refunded later on. Contacted support regarding the issue and they said a refund will be processed within 30 days. It has been 60 days now. And mind you I had to push them into refunding the money and yet they did not do it.

I have to go for work and wanted to have a meal before then. I ordered at 4.30pm and the delivery time was 30mins which was okay. But it's 5.22pm and my food hasn't arrive yet and I have to leave for work really soon. Worst part is there is no actual customer service available to cancel the order or anything, they just say "Sorry for inconvenience caused" and do absolutely nothing for you, the customer. Terrible customer service, at least Grabfood customer service actually helps you.

A consistently bad experience has become the norm. The majority of the time there are no drivers available. When I can order, the orders are very late resulting in cold food, melted ice, etc. Not sure what the problem is, but maybe you should try paying your driver's better and look at cutting cost elsewhere. I usually only use it for groceries now when I get a discount code and I'm not in a rush. Otherwise, I'm cooking at home.

Easy App navigation. Fastest delivery so far (30 mins and under) and reasonably priced deliveries especially the near distance eateries! Also the varieties of merchants on FoodPanda. Keep up the great work, thank you!

After you order, they put up an ETA of your order. Since it has happened SEVERAL times that after waiting several minutes, my order gets cancelled, I've made it a habit to check with them via chat if the store has actually confirmed my order. This time, after having spoken to 2 agents who asked me to wait then never replied again, the 3rd agent was a bit helpful. However, after our conversation, the ending was that the agent asked me to reach out to the store myself to follow up because they couldn't reach the line. Tried calling the hotline of the store and was given a number to contact (that was different from what the agent gave to me) and got an update within less than 3 minutes. Do not use FoodPanda. They make ordering inconvenient.

Don't even bother with this app. I downloaded this hoping for some cheaper delivery fee compared to grab, and sure, it is cheaper for like 10 pesos less but the customer support is absurd. There are no cancel options, the app's updates are bs, you can't even contact anyone. One thing this app is good at is burying stuff. You have no absolute way of getting good service in this app. Contact support? Take days and once you get a response, they don't even have any plans on acc resolving the issue.

I can't understand why my order never takes less than 2 Hours, I ordered at approximately 17:45 but now it's 19:12. Whereas the rider has picked up the order and is on the way. The timer is showing me 10-5 minutes but it's kinda stuck from the past 1.5 hours. It's really disappointing management. Well I'm really disappointed with everything there's nothing like customer support. I even called the rider and he isn't picking up calls...... Disappointing experience ever!!!!!!

Food delivery is fast. Vouchers are good. Popup discount instruction misleading. Customer service couldn't address my query. I got confused and gave up eventually. Was happy with my order yest. But today the restaurant sent me the wrong order. When I checked the system, the food item is gone. Even if system is not linked to stock level, they should at least notify customer that food is not available rather than just push any food to customer. Rice (which they decided for me) is soggy & salty.

my order was delayed for 2 hours and I can't even contact their customer service. I emailed them while waiting for the order but their replies were automated. The help center in the app was unhelpful too, the options were just to track my order, if I want to change something on my order, and a question asking "can I cancel my order" then answers "no". I have wasted my time waiting for it. They even gave me a compensation voucher where I could not even use because of a required HIGH MINIMUM SPEND

This app is extremely frustrating. There’s no clear way to contact support or follow up on orders. After waiting two hours, our order was cancelled without any assistance. Very disappointing experience.
The moment I paid for the pandapro, all the restaurants became temporarily unavailable. It also happened last month with another account. They want to take the money only. Not a trusted app anymore.

delivery cancelled after waiting an hour. If cant deliver why not cancel at the time of ordering. so many times this happens with me. waiting to arrive the order and suddenly got order cancelled msg. v poor service. I advised to select shoppee food instead. Will never use this app again

Tried to order. Error. Tried to order. Error. Tried to order. Error. Then all the sudden it says I have an order. 30 minutes later and it says order canceled. Tried to call the number for foodpanda to figure out what is wrong, automatically hangs up. Ive been using both food panda and grab a lot, not being able to even contact food panda about the problem is horrible customer service. You just made me a loyal Grab user. Here is the part where someone will say sorry but not actually fix anything.

🤬🤬🤬🤬Now, you have increased minimum spending limit, there are no valuable vouchers, the vouchers you are giving now are totally useless, plus your delivery charges are higher and additional you are charging plateform fee and VAT charges which makes no sense so everybody, if you are here for value so it's now useless even you are trying to but their pro subscription I am very disappointed, take a serious step to provide what you were in past days look upon my request

App returned an error when I tried to order saying it was unable to go through, so I ordered my meal through a different app. Little did I know the order had somehow still been placed without my knowledge, and I received a notification a while later when the rider was already on the way. Customer service explained it was a technical fault on their end but declined to take responsibility for the mishap, stating that 'I should have cancelled the order before it was being delivered'. Deplorable.

Warning to all users.Terrible customer service. I contacted their customer support after getting wrong order and short order, through their app. Nobody replied when they asked me to stay on the chat for the next 4-5 minutes even though I waited for more than 15 minutes. Allow at least a contact number so you can be contacted. Not going to order through this app again.

content: I had a few experiences with missing items ordered from Pandamart. They should be careful when come to pack n check the items correctly before making deliveries. Getting through the Help Live Chat and going to the supermarket the next day are a hassle for me. This happened to my latest order. I missed to check the items only to realise missing apples the next day. I am not sure if I were disconnected by accident or deliberately for a few times. I feel they are not making the effort. Uninstalled.

I wanted to order my lunch but when I got my order, I only got the extra sauce which was part of my order.... The most absurd thing about this stupid system is that it didnt warn me that I'm only ordering the extra sauce and not my original order which is a total of 133₱..After trying to check if its just a glitch.. content: Refunds are not doing their job investigating. No response and charges are just eating our money for free. Just scrap this app guys.

Everything works fine, until the app randomly charges you twice. Sure, it’s rare, but when it happens, good luck fixing it. Their customer service is shockingly incompetent and painfully slow. You’ll spend more time explaining the obvious than actually getting help. A smooth app ruined by some of the dumbest support I’ve ever dealt with.

Most drivers I notice at foodpanda is so irresponsible and they will not do anything about their mistake. instead you will just get refund and in this case, someone else enjoys your food for free.

And when rider decided to cancel, i will only be refunded in 14 working days. What kind of scam is this? Most horrible food delivery app experience ever.

content: Everything is good until something goes wrong. There is no support for customers & no helpline you can call. Highly DON'T Recommend My earlier review seems to have vanished so I'll write it again. After hesitating for a bit, I answer the call to no one on the other line. I drop the call and immediately see on the app that my location can't be found. I never liked foodpanda but gave it a chance again that time. Just use Grab.

its great. only problem is that it shouldn't be so hard to cancel an order that is being prepared. if its on the way thats fine if you can't cancel. would be 5 stars, but due to this, its 4.

The app is easy to use, but the time estimates are so so inaccurate and the most annoying part is foodpanda makes sure that we cannot complain about these issues because they already know they messed up so they just make it impossible to talk to an actual agent from customer service

However, instead of cancelling, they just mark the order as delivered to save face. Even if voucher is applied, it is wasted and Help agent is also no help at all

Improve search function in app. Let's say if I search "fish" it will come up with results like the "teheri" "kacchi" related restaurant as well where no fish items at all. There is no way to cancel an order once you've placed it even if it has been less than a minute, but they can cancel without notice after a 15-minute wait. No tipping too.

content: I tried ordering a dedication cake on Foodpanda using a new user voucher for 50% off and free shipping. Everything was fine until I realized I had forgotten to add the dedication message. After adding it to the special instructions, the voucher and free shipping disappeared. I tried using another account with a similar voucher, but it said, "Voucher cannot be used," even though it showed as available. The process was confusing, and I couldn’t get the deal I expected.

Vouchers are for show only. They're always, and I mean ALWAYS, not usable. Even vouchers with low amounts are unusable. They are always unavilailable because "Redeem limit was reached." What's more, even if you earn some of them, they have an expiration. You are being forced to use them. This is not good customer experience. This company went down the drain rather fast.
from this month orders gone so late least over an hour many times i order from food panda but they should pick responsible staff or restaurants

Promos are not worth it, as well as the price. Available restaurants in the area are not that many. Those are not enough for me to make the effort of coming back here and writing a review but I had just booked an order, it proceeded as successful booking, waiting time was 20-30 minutes and then after waiting 30 minutes the order was cancelled, totally, just like that, because "no rider was available at the area". Like, bruh i was hungry though?? Shoulda notify me earlier if that's the case
The service is good but recently there are long delays in delivery. Taking 3 hours to deliver an order is not justifiable.

Useless app, I ordered twice using this. the 1st one got cancelled after an hour of waiting. the 2nd one says that the delivery time is 35 mins until it became 2 hrs for a cafe that is less than 1 km to my place. Literally trash app that really upset people especially when we need to make a refund and the live chat just popped off and we can't get back to it.

When items are removed from an order on the business side, it does not give you a chance to replace the item or cancel the order, it wastes both my time and money spent on delivery. The after sales service is good, problems resolved quickly. Recently search filter based on restaurant ratings have been removed, less power towards consumers.
replyContent: Hi Andy, we're sorry to hear about the issues you faced with our services. It's our commitment to ensure orders are fulfilled accurately, and we'll work with our partners to improve this aspect. Your feedback has provided us with valuable insights into the improvements needed, we'll see how we can implement your ideas for improvement.

content: First time tried to order through FP. Placed order and after waiting for 35-40 mins, they cancelled the order and at that point its around 9.30pm so the shop (and most other restaurants) has closed. Estimated delivery kept changing too. Since first time experience is already like this, don't think I will even try again.

I've been using Foodpanda for more than 4 years now, recently their services have become exceptionally poor. I ordered from a place and the estimated delivery time kept on increasing, at one point after 1 hour of waiting I asked one of their staff in Chat if they're ever going to deliver the food, they replied that the restaurant is preparing the food and it will arrive any minute, but after waiting 25 more minutes I got a text from foodpanda saying that they had to cancel my order. Wow.

Obviously, there is something terribly wrong with the human assistance in their customer service dept. They claim that i had refused COD orders in the past, but yet they cannot tell me the dates of when i supposedly did such things. I requested the dates at least 10 times and each time they ignore me and talk like robots. They lied about my account history AND for what reason??? Weird Company, don't trust the service, especially if you need assistance. Better check the Reviews before you buy!!

App not working after I turned off location then turned on again.. Keep saying can't find address... Please fix this problem!! I have uninstalled an installed again and now it shows unknown error!! very good app for ordering food and grocery

Foodpanda provides efficient food delivery with a wide restaurant selection. Its tracking system and regular discounts improve the overall customer experience

Looks like their end is near. Missing/wrong items have become a norm, that too without any issue resolution. The chat helpline is just useless. I have saved myself from agony and have uninstalled this cheap, greedy app. Cheetay has improved alot in this regard, will be using that from now on. Ciao.

After making card payment, I was informed about the unavailability of the ordered item. Then Food Panda asked me if I want to replace the item with another option, which I agreed. Later I checked the price and found it to be much lesser than the initially ordered one. I couldn't get back to Food Panda since they don't provide any contact number. So I called the restaurant concerned, and they eventually admitted that they've been ordered by FP to give me lless than I've paid for. It's a shame!

Uninstall immediately. 1. It's ok to be a bit late. But an hour late and not even a message is not ok. 2. No option to cancel nor contact a live human being. Try ordering if you dare. Lol they will respond the day after via automated mail 3. They have the worst interface that I have seen and it's all automated. So if you have a problem or have questions don't expect to get help anytime soon.

It says on the app that restaurant is open (and we know it is open), then when we place our order, it will give an error message that restaurant is closed. Not just on 1 resto, but on multiple. I love to order food panda but if this keeps going on, might as well order directly to the resto. This is very frustrating because you chose the meals and everything and then suddenly when you place an order, the error message appears. Hence the 1 star, if this will be fixed, will give higher rating.

I called the guests assuming the order would be seamless, but I was so wrong! Tried to order more than 10 times but it kept giving a payment error. No one bothered to call back, as I am assuming someone may have received the error log and should have called back after repetitive error alerts. There was no proper calling number available either to get help on the issue.

Lately, my cards are being refused for payment when they all have greater balances than my order's price and delivery fee combined. Is this an individual Food Panda account problem or is this happening to some users as well? Why is this happening? I don't have cash all the time and isn't it one of the reasons why you included cashless payments?? I wanted to go cashless with deliveries to minimize the exchange of money as part of being careful. It's frustrating.

It was good in the first year. Currently terrible customer service. When ordering through Pandamart or 711 stores, they bill you right away the full amount then you will find out that it's sold out. Yes, you will be refunded after 10x of following up and if you don't follow up, they won't refund or take action. Basically you're giving them money. And if they refund, they will refund more than 7 days. They also do not give the full amount of "tip your rider".

This app makes us wait for 1 and half hour and then they cancel the order! REASON: NO AVAILABLE DELIVERY GUY ON THAT AREA The app should tell at the very first that they don't have delivery person on that area and not when we already waited for long! On the details, its only 30mins but it keep changing, sometimes it become 60mins then drop to 13 then back to 15. if you total the added mins, it already more than an hour. I'm very disappointed that I experience this at my first use of this app.

content: Terrible customer service and app features. There's no option to contact the rider and there's no update whether the rider already arrived or not. I disputed the payment but customer service only said the rider waited for too long and will not refund the payment. Meanwhile, Grab resolves these kinds of cases very quickly.

Order from lotus penang sungai dua. Wrong items delivered and don't want to provide refund. Rider no check and don't care. Foodpanda customer service also not helping. Worst service. Never use this app again.

My last few orders were pretty late . And today's order was the worst. Waited for almost 1.30hrs then a person calls from the Foodpanda office tell me to pick from the rider from another spot . I don't know what kind of customer service is this but it needs to change . It's very frustrating. I always vouched for Foodpanda. I ordered every now and then but now it's bad

Got screwed over 3 times due to "restaurant is closed" while I was ordering or "restaurant cancelled due to lack of menu item" instead of replacing the order with something else. What's worse is that I can't make a replacement order because I use PayPal and when I got refunded, they freeze the amount. Why pay for something before the confirmation that I will get the thing I ordered, instead I pay first to gamble that my order may or may not get cancelled.

third time i've given a one star, the plot just thickens. apparently you're supposed to press the tiny link at the end of check out to read the terms and conditions everytime you make an order, otherwise they'll never let you know you're NOT getting a refund after the vendor 'accepted' your order. now it doesn't matter that you've tried to cancel it IMMEDIATELY after you pressed check out, and it really doesn't matter if you've personally called the store to ensure they HAVE NOT received order.

We're always ordering food through food oanda and then just today we encounter an error in the system. We just clicked once to order then the rider told us that it's a double order?! Update your system! We will never use your app again! We really hate your service to the point there's no way to cancel when in fact maybe it's just your dirty schemes to get more money! You don't care about your customers and drivers and affiliated companies!

It's always a hit and miss with this one. I probably get more than 10 payment errors a year when I use this app. The customer service people are helpful but I just can't afford to have my payment delayed/refunded everytime I order food. If they can fix their bugs then that would be great. Your discounts are your only saving grace. Also, Why do your riders seem to never have change/cash on them? Why is it the customer's problem when they don't have change to give? Shouldn't they be prepared??

I wish I could rate it 0 stars. For an app dedicated for food delivery, this has the worst delivery time and the worst customer support. I've had my orders takes 2 hours or more to get delivered. There were times when my courier had an issue with their vehicle and I tried telling that to support but they still did not cancel my order. Use GrabFood instead. Don't waste your time here.

Foodpanda is a game-changer Craving something delicious? They've got you covered! 😋 Wide variety of restaurants, super fast delivery, and the tracking feature is 🔥 I love how I can order from my fave spots in Riyadh and track my food's journey. Only thing I'd suggest is improving packaging for some restaurants, but overall, I'm obsessed! 👍 Would definitely recommend for a quick and tasty fix.

I strongly don’t recommend using this app. Some riders are on bicycle handling multiple bookings at the same time, which clearly affects delivery speed. It took way longer than expected for me to receive my order. The estimated delivery time was 20 minutes when I placed it, but that wasn’t even close to what actually happened. This kind of service is honestly frustrating and unreliable.

Decided to stop using this platform when I was double charged and the customer service refused to look into it although it was obvious from my tngo statement that there was two charges. I complained numerous times and got frustrated after many months of trying. No proper customer service records so if you complain many times, the customer is unable to keep track. The deals are not worth it if you may spend more due to the glitch in their platform which they do not want to take responsibility of.

after one hour, no news about my food. looking everywhere on the app, no possibility to contact an agent for support. after 20 min, i find a way to get support from agent, only under "issues with payment"...of course, only for payment, you can contact an agent. they say there is allegedly a lot of traffic, so it takes more time than usual. in that case, why not NOTIFY the customer BEFORE they order ? Why not make it easy to reach out to agent for follow up? i deleted the app.

waited more than 2 hours for our food and then cancels our order last minute, changes wait times so often that we have to wait 2+ hours for our food. app is often glitching. I have never been this frustrated with a food delivery app. Worst app for food delivery. they really need to fix their app. Absolutely garbage.

Worst experience with Foodpanda. I’ve been a regular customer for the past 2 years, but today was honestly disappointing. I ordered a burger and even after 2.5 hours, it still wasn’t delivered. When I checked, they said it would be delivered by the seller, with no clear time, basically "whenever." At that point, I might’ve been asleep already. I requested a cancellation, and they agreed to cancel it but refused to issue a refund. After making me wait for over 3 hours, trying to keep the payment

Foodpanda is my favorite app for whenever I’m hungry because the delivery is always so fast and reliable. I love how easy it is to track my order in real-time and find great deals on all my favorite local restaurants. It’s super convenient for those busy days when I don't have time to cook!

I ordered for the first time and used their 50% voucher on my order. I paid using G-Cash and connected my acc to the food app. After the transaction, G-Cash already deducted my money for the discounted price, but the transaction on the FoodPanda App failed. So I basically ordered the same thing, paid the balance, and this time it went through. I paid for DOUBLE! The app didn't process my refund. Horrible experience!

Foodpanda makes ordering food straightforward and quick. There's a solid range of restaurants, and the real-time tracking keeps you updated without having to guess. Occasional delays during busy periods, but the promotions and Pandapro discounts add great value. Good overall experience.

Don't download this garbage app!!! When i placed my order, an error occured, so i kept clicking it but an 'error' always showed up. Obviously, any sane person would do is to just cancel the order. So i did that. I open grap instead and ordered there. But a foodpanda driver kept calling, saying that i need to pay. So i checked it and was shocked to see that my order did go through. I was unprepared, and angry that i had to pay for that. i kept explaning that there was an error, but it was no use.

after using this app for 4 years or so, i got double charged for around 393 pesos, the first time using my debit in a payment and it takes a whole month to get it reviewed?!?! this is ridiculous, the actual rule is to make me forget about it!! i’ve uninstalled the app and i’m NOT going to use it again UNLESS I RECEIVE A REFUND FOR THIS!

Foodpanda's my go-to for food delivery in the PH! Craving something specific? They've got tons of restaurants and cuisines to choose from. Delivery's usually fast, and the drivers are pretty cool about it. Love how I can track my order and know when it'll arrive. Promos are lit too - always snagging deals on orders. If you're in Manila or other big cities, Foodpanda's a must-have for food at your door!"

The service had been top notch till last week. My order not only gets delayed by an hour but the order when received is lacking a bunch of items. Issued a complaint to the so-called 'FoodPanda Support Team' and they provide me with unusable voucher codes, when asked why the codes aren't working, they give you the lamest of reasons----- that I have already used up my vouchers, despite the fact that I provide them proof that no orders have been made since their last screw up. Very disappointed.

Pandamart is a lifesaver. I can get basic groceries, snacks, or even a phone charger delivered in under 20 minutes. The real-time tracking is very accurate, and the riders in my area are always professional. I do wish the 'small order fee' was a bit lower, but for the speed and convenience, it's hard to beat
really good food but sometimes they get your order wrong

Never order from Foodpanda especially in Singapore. Almost always there will be some items missing and when you raise a complaint, they will refuse to refund even when they have not delivered the item. They run some fake "buy 3 get x% off" offers and will then deliver only one or two is those items. Seems to be a scam that they are running.
I have been trying to log in to my account since 10.03.26, I have contacted support but they can't resolve my issue.
I'm getting an error while placing an order at the end i was unable to add my debit card it says something went wrong

I have been using the app for quite sometime now, but I can't find the option to leave a review, I don't get the email notification to leave a review/ rating. This is frustrating. You don't have any option to review the restaurant from your past orders from the app or website. This should be fixed. A user should be able to leave a review on past orders anytime from their logged accounts. I just contacted support about this and he said unfortunately there's no way to leave a review if you did not receive the email notification to leave a review or rating. That's bonkers. I'm not receiving those emails and the chat support says he can't do anything about it.

Very bad experience! My first order was not success, but the system showed normal page, then after I waited 25 min. Only found out the order not valid, so i ordered other food from other shop again. And again, I have to wait another 60 min to get my second food, and the rider did not get my place, resulted I have to go to a meet up point to get my food! It is a very terrible experience. Highly not recommend!
