Horrible service !!! A product got missing from my order and then around 3 hours later, they notify me the product is out of stock and would like to deliver me something alternate and more expensive. It's not about the money dude. If you cant take responsibilities, you shouldn't be. And lastly stop blaming the restaurants for your wrong doings. Delivered me a wrong order again, dissatisfied and disappointed with the service.
replyContent: Hi Sharlina, We sincerely regret the experience you've been through. Please share your order/account details at customercare@foodpanda.in so that we can help you with a satisfactory resolution. Thanks!

content: Added the PandaPro Subscription for a month along with my food order few days ago via Gcash. Food order tagged delivered/received but subscription on the app says pending (Processing for Payment) even though the whole amount of the order was deducted on my Gcash account. reached out with FP CS and says they can't see anything on their system for the subs. Definitely you can't see it coz status on the app only says pending. Today, not showing pending but not subscribed. no refund.
App is buggy. Discounts often dont get applied properly or are falsely advertised and customer service is usually unhelpful in resolving the differences.

The worst food delivery app. does not let you reach out for a live agent with an on going order. waited 3hours+ for my order (happened twice already). there's no way to cancel the order despite having no riders accepting the order for 3hrs+. so frustrating and a complete waste of time.

Terrible experience. Ordered food with a promised delivery time of 30 minutes, but it took over 2 hours with no proper updates. Contacted support and instead of resolving the issue, they kept asking me to wait and then ended the chat. If delays happen, at least inform customers honestly. Very disappointing service.

It was very Good till 3 4 months ago but now very bad service. The orders are delivered so late and this has happened to me consecutively 4 times in a row. Everything is disorganized. So many restaurants mostly show temporary unavailable. When I contact the agent they don't answer propably and just say that they are sorry and the same thing happens again. They punch the orders late to the restaurants as well. The food is sometimes cold and soggy too. Really disappointed in food panda.

I am extremely disappointed with Food Panda. It's evident that they have no regard for customer satisfaction. Not only did they take an outrageous 1 hour and 40 minutes to deliver my order, but they consistently send wrong orders. Their support agents are shockingly illiterate, lacking basic communication skills and problem-solving abilities. When I asked them to cancel my order and provide a refund, they had the audacity to cancel the order but deny the refund. Highly not recommended.

I have deleted the app. They took my money and dont provide any services. Their customer service is nonexistent. They are a constant let down. They dont deliver your food at all, they mess up your order, they take hours to deliver and they advertise discounts but dont adhere to it. Their "chat" option is a joke and always drops the chat. They dont have a customer service number. There are way better food delivery options.

Foodpanda has extremelly poor coordination with tge restaurants. After almost 30 to 60 minutes of placing my order, I got a message saying that the restaurant did not accept my order. Foodpanda should have immediately notified the customer within 5 to 10 minutes after the order has been placed. I can easily let this go had it happened only once but it happened three times already and with three different restaurants. I used to love this app but right now I am just so disappointed.
Exceptional service and great deals. Thank you foodpanda🤍🫶🏻
very poor delivery system. my order came almost 2 hours after i place my order, the food is cold. i already cancelled my subscription, never ordering here again. 👎
Every area is, they're not operating in. Idk if this is a bug or they're actually not operating in my area but I'm hungry at 4 am. Trying cheetay now edit: orders are always late

Never fails to disappoint. Have switched to Grab for a long time and this time i decided to use foodpanda to take part in a lucky draw (not guaranteed win) and guess what. They delivered me a wrong food item. I had chosen the option of cancelling the whole order if one of the food item isn't available and yet they delivered me something else without my acknowledgement. I totally have no confidence in their customer service even if i seeked help from them, I'm prepared to get the worst, again.
Service going down, strange behavior, they cancelled a paid order & never returned amount & then removed that from my history even though I have screenshots

This app contains deceptive ads to try and get you to sign up for their subscription. They will list the trial period as being a certain price and instead charge you a far higher price for a yearly subscription even when you have selected the trial subscription. The customer service agents do try to help resolve your issue but it's worrying that Foodpanda employs such deceptive practices to market their services. I'd implore others to be wary and careful about using this app.

They provide excellent service! The waiting times are often off, but it's such a minor thing, I'll still give 5 stars. Their customer service is also amazing, helpful, and very quick to assist with any issue. I also love the price reduction of ordering here rather than going into the store/shop yourself. SO convenient! And they provide most things in English, which is great for foreigners. Sit back and shop all you want and need!

Took 3 hours today after confirmation of order and still order not received. After terrible conversation with their staff, they blamed the restaurant but the restaurant didn't receive any notification. After 3 hours of frustration i told them to cancel the order, they cancelled it without a thought. Worst experience of online order in my life. Although this wasn't the first time and happened 3-4 times before too.  This app has fake images of the items displayed in any restaurant. The order received is totally different if you try to order something new.  Sms deals are fake, only to attract customers. If there is a deal on a specific item in a specific restaurant, then if you open the app and select the restaurant you won't find that deal anywhere.  Its more easier and convenient to just search a restaurant in google and call them on the number displayed for order.
couldn't be a worse delivery app ever, tried to pay when I finally decided what to order and for some reason I couldn't pay and my voucher was gone while I never used it, bad app

NOTE TO ANYONE USING THE APP RIGHT NOW. Currently there's a bug that take your orders twice upon ordering food, causing 2 separate, but identical orders to be made. Tried to call center, all they said was that they can cancel the order but not refund even though the fault was on their side. Also, what's the point of your help center if it cannot even amend mistakes 1s after ordering because most restraunts automatically accepts the order? Utter joke of a policy.
nice rider , fast work , make something on time with their schedule

Good experience .. They provide excellent service! The waiting times are often off, but it's such a minor thing, I'll still give 5 stars. Their customer service is also amazing, helpful, and very quick to assist with any issue. I also love the price reduction of ordering here rather than going into the store/shop yourself. SO convenient! And they provide most things in English, which is great for foreigners. Sit back and shop all you want and need❤

Latest update gets stuck at the "Select Payment Method" page, without Express Checkout turned on. But if I turn on Express Checkout then it shows the "Place Order" page, but does not allow you to order (even after pressing multiple times). Will wait for the next bug update, in the meantime, using Grabfood instead.

I ordered groceries from Pandamart and one item was missing. The chat agent told me that they can't give a refund "based on my case history". This is probably because, a few weeks ago, I also reported a missing item and they gave a refund for it. Note that both instances of missing items WERE NOT MY FAULT --- THEY WERE THE FAULT OF WHOEVER PACKED THE ITEMS. This company is a waste of time. I'd give zero stars if I could.

The restaurant has confirmed the cancellation of the order due to a website error resulting in two orders for delivery. Despite this, Pandago/Foodpanda, the third-party delivery service, failed to cancel the order on their end. Unfortunately, your irate and unhelpful customer service did not even assist in resolving the problem. Instead, ended the call even though I am still explaining on what really happened. Disappointing.

im using foopanda as Pro account almost 8 years......at year 4 i noticing something not right in their app.......on 2026 they setting wont let you cancel the order if had emergency need out from the address....will uninstall this app after my subcribe as Pro user

Please fix the 'if item is unavailable, cancel entire order' option. I have this issue for a few times now and I keep selecting that option but its not working or the store is disregarding it. Also, customer service was good before and they really worked on what needed to be done.. but thats not the case anymore. What happened?

The account making is such a hassle, it won't recognize my number, it says "number is invalid", contacted customer service but it only dragged the whole inconvenience, they said my number is already registered but I haven't registered my phone number previously, I haven't received a verification through sms so I don't know how that number is registered, in the end it never fixed anything. The whole app and website is broken, I will not be using this app/service anytime soon.

Delayed delivery, missing orders/incorrect items. Ticket was closed but was not really resolved. Your sorry cant ease the frustration and dissapointment we had. Stop scamming people, accepting orders even though item is unavailable and not advising. Too late, noticed about the missing items but the rider already left. Contacted support but nothing helps. We wont order here again.

Restaurants provided very low quantities when we use any discount voucher, they even not providing complete orders as they written in the description... They don't even care about the packaging of foods. For that, the app should have a picture reviews section, (only text reviews are available) but we need to show the new comers the exact order we received.
Offers food from different cuisines, groceries, and sometimes pharmacy or convenience store items.

Restaurant review feature missing. For a company and an app this big, you can easily implement an efficient restaurant review system. The current system is broken and does not work 9/10 times. And there's no option to review past restaurants and orders. I just have to keep my fingers crossed and make sure I see the review option next time I open the app, which almost never happens now. Shows a lot about where foodpanda's interests lie. Not with the consumer but with the restaurants.

The app is great but the drivers are just so unprofessional sometimes they intentionally tell you they dont have enough change for you so you will be forced but to give the amount that is more than your order when you can clearly see all the cash and coins on their wallets. I ordered food for convenience since its too tiring to cook when you work in graveyard and im already too sleepy. They take too much time and even calls you twice. its annoying. Pls just follow the pin.

Tragedy. Not only the app but desktop version too. So bad working platform. Receive some coupons for discount which can not be applied. Not possible because of some issues again. Last week I had a case when I ordered and the order was not received by the platform... again. Today support of the platform does not answer me... whole day. Great!

Your service is awful. You are 2 hours late but I cannot cancel my order. Your app says cancellation of order is subject to the approval of the restaurant so I ring up the restaurant. Food is already getting cold because you have not sent a rider! And they cannot cancel from their end, too. And your customer service will get back to me in 24hours?

Would give zero if I could. Delivery is pretty much always late. Same restaurants on deliveroo or grab food don't have this issue. Just now my food was over 20 mins late. Foodpanda help advised me to ignore the delivery tracker. What use is an app like this when you have no idea when your food will arrive! Edit: came back 5 years later and everything is still just as terrible. They deliver the food to the wrong address and then lie to you and say it was delivered correctly. Terrible service
Delivers different cuisine making it outstanding and are quick with delivery and on time.

I don't even want to rate it one star.. its quality is so bad .. I've received my first order and its awful .. the chicken is burnt and the veggies are gross .. if u don't want to spoil your money don't buy a single thing from it..
Fast and easy food ordering.

The app says "our drivers cannot reach you. Try another location" without me even selecting a restaurant. I am on Sukhumvit. They delivered to my condo last week. There is constantly at least 1 driver downstairs delivering an order. How can there be a location issue? If delivery isn't possible, then what is the point of using your company. If I have to go to the store to fetch it myself I won't be wasting more of my time using your app. There is no contact us option on your app, only FAQ

Only put one star because it's the least, wish I could put 0 stars. Dreadful app. For over a week all the orders are canceled, that's over 200 orders canceled. It's a joke. I can't rely on this app to order anything. The only problem is that there are no other food apps available where I live. But that's what you get for living in a 5th world country.

Pathetic customer service. Initially they cared a lot about customers but now it just seems like they have hired fools for customer service who cannot resolve anything. Also the amount of mistakes with time is also increasing. Slowly it is becoming one of the least desired apps to order from. Even though it has the largest variety, I would rather order from other food delivery apps
I have few issues with this application plz try to make it better and fix the issues like it takes time to opne and not showing images of restaurants some features are not working properly.
Have problems starting when I change my phone. Keep on mentioning does not support the apps. I have to delete and install the app again.
Please give option to rate pandamart riders as some misbehave too much.

Waited 4 hours for food that never arrived.Customer services contact was glitchy meaning I had to restart the chat every 30 mins or so. Was promised a voucher but it was never attached tot he email they sent. Went back to try one more time and the app wouldn't let me input my card details. Would not recommend to my worst enemy. I never write reviews that's how bad it was.

I ordered from the same restaurant and there were no issues.

Utterly awful. I make the whole order, and then apparently my number is blocked on their system. Frustrating. Awful. Waste of my time.
Turned 18 got a new sim added the old Gmail. Tried to order. PEHLAORDER is not available for you But I do get free delivery. Most of the vouchers I can't use.
doesn't even let me verify my phone number. every time I do it tells me the verification number is wrong.
Sometimes the let you order and wait for long time then cancel, very frustrating with minimal assistance or compensation

They charge you, cancel your order and then conveniently do everything to avoid to refund your money back. Caveat on doing cashless transactions. Their cs is a bunch of robots with canned responses to everything you can possibly complain about. It's been 3 months of following up on the money they stole from me. I've been back and forth between them and my bank. They say they have processed a refund for 3 FAILED orders. I've yet to receive anything as my bank says there were no refunds processed!

This app has gone from great to terrible. I ordered today and made sure my delivery address is correct only to find out that it's not registering in their map. You really have to move the pin in their map. In addition to this disappointing experience, the app is displaying a different list of food which makes it confusing if I really am paying the right amount for the food I ordered. Quiet displeasing.

Terrible. Unprofessional. Ordered food from a restaurant at 2ঃ30 pm and they cancelled the order on 3ঃ 15 over phone saying they don't deliver in Badda. Then why the hell did you not inform me right after the order was placed? The representative of foodpanda on the phone also requested not to order from that particular restaurant because they had issues with the restaurant. Why don't you the restaurant from your list then? What the hell is this? Why take an order and then cancel it after almost an hour later? Terrible app. Really unprofessional.
payment method removed still showing at check out hard to add new payment methods.
Unable to add credit or debit card as payment method, IOS version works fine, but Android version sucks.

I don't think foodpanda listens to it's customers. There have been many instances where I have to cancel an order right after ordering and change the item or amount of item in an order after ordering. There is no option to do that. It has been five years since I conveyed this comment to the team but no action ever. Hence the 1 star. If the app is updated according to the need of customers, will update the rating.

Terrible service. Several occasions of hiccup. One time they didn't deliver my item but refused to refund the delivery fees. Another time the restaurant was closed but they didn't inform me until 1hr later. Refund takes a long time too. Customer service not helpful at all. Every time you order its a risk that you won't get it or have to pay for nothing and not get back your money. Avoid!!
it's perfect but you should give vocher of 500 300 more than 1000 1200

Ridiculous experience. After I ordered, the store message me that the item is unavailable, then why put it as available in the first place? I said to cancel the unavailable item and proceed with the order. After few minutes, the store cancelled my order. I tried contacting the support and they said they cannot give me a refund due to refund policy that I cancelled my order. Ridiculous It is not my fault that the item was unavailable!

Foodpanda should ban all their riders from picking up many orders at anytime. So freaking unfair to the last customer on the delivery list. The rider can pick up 2 from Foodpanda & pick up another 3 from Foodmonkey. Imagine how long & unfair the last customer got to wait. If I'm the last customer to be delivered on the rider's list, then I should be given discounted delivery fee ! Why must I pay for a standard delivery fee & force to wait till the rider finish deliver 4 or 5 customers b4 me ?

Used to be a big fan until something goes wrong with an order. My order was delayed for an hour and they insisted that I will still get charged for cancellation. Only after further complains and when the order keeps on getting further delay then they agree to cancel without penalty. Not what I expect as a daily regular customer. Deliveroo handles their loyal customers much better, switching there.
I love the group order discounts and the pickup orders!
On old phone this app wouldn't launch. now new phone, this app didn't notify, and now... would launch but wouldn't open properly only loads partially

Your refund process is VERY DISAPPOINTING. My order was cancelled last night and you charged me real-time (I paid online) . But my money has NOT YET been returned UP UNTIL NOW! Why can you charge real-time but you cannot return the money instantly when the order got cancelled. The money should be returned instantly when the order got cancelled that's how it should be! You're customer service is just telling me to wait 5-7 days of turn around time. That's NOT ACCEPTABLE. #UninstallFoodPanda

I'm afraid that the rider marked the order as delivered just like that. The rider got a flat tire and accidentally marked my order delivered when it was not really delivered. Good thing the rider contacted me because I thought he took off with my order. It was paid btw. I'm never gonna use cc again unless you give the customer the right to confirm that the order was indeed delivered. And you don't show the rider's profile too. In the other app, you could see where exactly the rider is.

Absolutely horrible service. Advertised 30 minute delivery time and doesn't notify you of change in delivery time until 30 minutes have passed. Does not allow you to cancel order despite having to wait more than double the initially advertised waiting time.

You don't have refund process transaction. I had encountered missing items on a shop and the refund process took so long however, for the first one I encountered, I didn't receive a refund from it. So I am afraid I may not receive a refund from now because I have a missing item again. Please not put products that doesn't exist on the store. Customer service is annoying. It is repeating. Repeated response which I already know.

App was good. Foodpanda's pricings itself are the problem. We have minimum amounts of P109 for anything. Even when the amount is less than 100, you'll pay the diferrence plus the delivery fee. I don't get it. The company is getting greedy. It's not about being lazy to buy the food itself, it's about the convenience to get food when you don't have time to go to a mall just to buy that specific food. Your original pricing was better than this.
Delivery time says around 40mins but it took more than 2 hours..

Great disappointment.First order last year with voucher but order was been cancelled for no reason. Voucher gone. Friend recommended again this month so I tried. NO more first time order voucher never mind. Order with pick up. It says pick up time was 5.57pm. Which I order 10mins back. Reach there at 5.58pm. They told me they just received my order so I have to wait. The price in apps was highly than I order there. What is the purpose to order in advance and paying more?

FP Customer Service is the worst. I booked an advance order and it didn't arrive. We reached out to FP CS but kept telling us to just check the order tracking page and that a rider has already been assigned. But if we hadn't called the restaurant, they too are actually waiting for the rider to arrive and the food was already prepared hours ago! Even when I asked to re-assign and the details of the 'assigned rider' they could not even give that to us. WORST. CUSTOMER. SERVICE. EXPERIENCE.

Its not all about the app, its about the service you provide to customers which makes your app a better app but in food panda case the service is just worst then I thought, moreover the restaurants can cancel the order anytime they want, my order was cancelled after half hour before it was placed....they shouldn't give the option of placing the order if they were busy.... Pathetic experience..

Always. I repeat, ALWAYS, late deliveries. I only downloaded this app to to avoid making calls but it's just so bad. I have had the worse experience. Also only selected restaurants has food panda. What I only like about it, it doesn't have a delivery fee ( most of the restaurants).

Horrible experience using Pandamart. Store accepted my order even when they ran out of 1 of the items i wanted and i clearly stated "cancel entire order if an item runs out". In the end, I ended up paying extra money. Contacted Help Centre and most of the agents either cant type proper english/misread my situation. Does your app even have chat support? Like an actual person? We're having a problem with an order that's been placed where a restaurant can't fulfill the order--there's no cancel button on your app once the restaurant accepted. You should change your app interface and customer privileges.

I order on this app all the time and the service was good, never had any issues. But, these past few months my orders have always been messed up! Yesterday I ordered all my cravings but ended up with someone else's order with my name on it. The worst part is that I don't even like the food that they got and I waited for an hour just to be disappointed. Tried asking for a refund but nothing's come through when before they're refunds were super quick.

I installed the app as required by Glife( Gcash). They gave me a code for free delivery with minimum spent. Upon checking out code is not working. I choose to remove the code and process it with delivery fee. App is unresponsive ( potential bug) but order was placed. It took an hour when I received notification that order has been delivered and I haven't received nothing. I contacted support and it they can't resolve the issue. I decided to uninsttalled the app. I use now GrabFood.

Too many issues! I'll get notifications regarding restaurants that are not available in my area. Where's the long distance delivery that you keep announcing is available? When I tried to cancel my order because it was taling too long to be delivered, I was threatened that I will not be able to use the COD option. That's okay, since I will be deleting this app after this review.

Terrible. Shows that my driver is 5 minutes away but my order got cancelled because "they tried to reach me but they can't". I hope the full refund goes through ASAP.

BEWARE: DO NOT ATTACH YOU CARD TO THIS APP. One of the item in my order was sold out but since i used my debit card, i already paid for it. I was waiting for a refund but I WAS NOT REFUNDED!! This had happened twice!! I spoke to a representative via chat and he said that it will take 30-45 DAYS to refund my money. It wasn't my fault that the item was sold out, FOOD PANDA should've had a system to automatically refund that money if the item was sold out, why should we wait for a month? LOGIC!

This app is full of bugs and incorrect information and makes food ordering a hell. It even lacks some critical features like group orders. Since hipMenu closed I had to use this app and I've never had an order without problems (forgotten items, canceled orders after 1h of waiting, order items not showing up on checkout but still pay for them). Don't use this app there are better alternatives. We want HipMenu back!

Worst app ever. Order if you have 2 hours to spare. - Rider took more than an hour to pick up food. Got so much free time to stop by somewhere far from the restaurant for a while. - Chat didn't work. So hard to cancel orders when u want to. Merchant can't cancel and the delivery partner DON'T want to cancel yet I've been waiting for my food for AN HOUR.

Worst app I've ever seen. I never get my food on time, the app shows one time and delivers at another. content: Rude and awful service. An order came in missing some items. I contacted Foodpanda - at first they insisted that the items were never supposed to be included in the order I made. Then I sent them a screenshot of the order, and they were forced to acknowledge that the items were missing and gave me a refund by voucher... with a minimum order value that I, as a solo traveler, would never hit in a single order. I told them as much; that the minimum order value made the voucher useless to me. Their response: "nothing we can do." But why didn't you let me know about the minimum order value beforehand? "Sorry. Nothing we can do." Can you change the minimum order value? "No." Can you cancel and issue a new voucher? "No." Can you split the voucher, so that the minimum order is lower? "No." And then the agent disconnected me... while I was in the middle of typing a reply. This is on a chat system where you can see when the other person is typing. A second agent also disconnected me while I was typing. A third rep told me the same string of "No"s, with the added caveat that I should tell the agents to lower or waive the minimum order value BEFORE they process the voucher, as the system locks it in place... but the issuing agent had never told me that he was issuing a voucher at all - he'd just unilaterally announced it without ever giving a heads-up of what was going on. Either way, service was rude and unaccommodating. I'd recommend using Grab instead if you're traveling through southeast Asia.

However, many users report unreliable delivery times, late or cancelled orders, and poor customer support, especially when issues arise (e.g., refunds or mistakes). App ini mudah di luluskan untuk membuat pesanan pada sesiapa sahaja terutama sekali termasuk scammer. Scammer boleh membuat pesanan walhal dengan menggunakan number telifon dari luar negara sudah boleh membuat pesanan di Malaysia.
